parsed_output.justification: Dylan's behavior is highly erratic and contradictory throughout the discussion. He claims to have been the Werewolf, then claims to be the Seer, and mentions looking in the center (an action only available to the Seer or a lone Werewolf), making his claims mutually exclusive. While Brett claims to have swapped Dylan and Dan, Dylan's own admissions and inconsistent role claims make him the most suspicious player and the most likely candidate for a Werewolf or the Tanner.
